_note: Pin weekly_snapshot AUDIT_LAYOUT names to ShipHero SKUs when fuzzy name matching can't bridge the gap (audit-layout 'Hair Clay' vs ShipHero 'Clay'; legacy V1 SKU mis-flagged is_kit=True hiding the real V2 single; etc.). Keys are AUDIT_LAYOUT names (case-sensitive). Each entry pins to either a single 'sku' (one trusted physical SKU) or a list of 'skus' (sum on_hand across multiple physical SKUs that the audit layout treats as one product, e.g. 50ml + 100ml size variants).
_format: Each entry: <AUDIT_LAYOUT name> -> {sku: <ShipHero SKU>} | {skus: [<ShipHero SKU>, ...]}. Edit when ShipHero canonical names drift or new size variants ship.
